title: helodium repens
intro: Helodium repens, also known as the floating sweet grass, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Tofieldiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helodium repens include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Helodium repens are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to support overall health and well-being.
